name: Fried Ice Cream1
recipeIngredient: About A Quart of Ice Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. The day before serving, make the batter: Mix the flour, sugar, salt, oil, and egg yolks in a mixing bowl. Gradually stir in the beer. Refrigerate covered overnight.
2. Also the day before serving, coat each ice cream ball thoroughly with crushed cornflakes. Place the ice cream balls in the coldest part of the freezer overnight.
3. When ready to serve, heat the peanut oil in a deep-fat fryer or deep pot to 375°F (190°C).
4. Beat the egg whites until stiff and fold into the batter.
5. Coat 2 or 3 of the ice cream balls completely and heavily with the batter. Carefully add them to the hot oil. Maintain the temperature at 375°F (190°C). Fry the ice cream until golden brown. Remove with a slotted spoon, drain briefly on paper towels, and serve immediately. Repeat with remaining ice cream balls.
